crime.value: Murder of narrator's mother, possibly arson/fire-related attack that also burned the father
crime.quote: He heard screams from the basement, he went down there and he he was burned... did he see who killed my mother

victim.value: The narrator's mother, a real estate agent who was killed in what appears to be a basement attack
victim.quote: I had a dream of me being a successful real estate agent just like my mother

investigator.value: First-person narrator, the son of the murder victim, investigating his mother's death
investigator.quote: I asked him what happened, did he see who killed my mother

red_herring.value: Intentionally wrong grade level on tardy slip to avoid detention and create false trail
red_herring.quote: I signed it putting my wrong grade level on purpose so that it would make it harder for them to find me

clue_fairness.value: Father's account of the fire incident - heard screams from basement, went down, was burned
clue_fairness.quote: He heard screams from the basement, he went down there and he he was burned.

social_world.value: Family loyalty system with local business owner Peet receiving extra payment for preferential service
social_world.quote: My family are loyal customers to Mr.Peet and would pay him extra for his service

alibi.value: Father's vague memory of fire incident - claims it was 'all a blur' when asked what happened
alibi.quote: I asked him what happened, did he see who killed my mother. He told me it was all a blur.

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's isolation and abandonment - losing mother, hospitalized father, romantic rejection by Ashley
investigator_wound.quote: After realizing I had nobody, I started to cry in front of the nurse. I had started to cry again, I had NO ONE
